title: Active fire behaviour continuing in Swartberg
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The wildfire on the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The wildfire on the Swartberg Mountain near Oudtshoorn remains uncontained, with active fire behaviour continuing on both the southern and northern slopes.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The wildfire on the Swartberg Mountain near Oudtshoorn remains uncontained, with active fire behaviour continuing on both the southern and northern slopes."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"On the southern side, fire activity persists in steep and difficult terrain. Strong south-westerly winds are currently limiting suppression efforts, with active firelines estimated at approximately 3 to 4 km."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the north-western flank, the fireline has spread rapidly downslope and has threatened farming infrastructure.","html":"On the north-western flank, the fireline has spread rapidly downslope and has threatened farming infrastructure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the eastern flank, the fire raced through a flat valley into Meiringspoort due to strong south-westerly winds of approximately 35 km/h, resulting in temporary traffic delays.","html":"On the eastern flank, the fire raced through a flat valley into Meiringspoort due to strong south-westerly winds of approximately 35 km/h, resulting in temporary traffic delays."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Teams from the GRDM, CapeNature, Working on Fire, Oudtshoorn Municipality, Central Karoo District Municipality, and the South African National Defence Force are currently battling the blaze on a game farm and in the Meiringspoort area.","html":"Teams from the GRDM, CapeNature, Working on Fire, Oudtshoorn Municipality, Central Karoo District Municipality, and the South African National Defence Force are currently battling the blaze on a game farm and in the Meiringspoort area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193.","html":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous aricle:","html":"Previous aricle:"},{"type":"list","items":["Fire remains contained near infrastructure","Swartberg fire remains uncontained"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Active fire behaviour continuing in Swartberg
